# GoalOS Copilot Instructions

Preserve the claim boundary. Do not introduce unsupported claims of achieved AGI, ASI, guaranteed returns, legal approval, production activation, user-fund authorization, or mainnet deployment.

All new proof artifacts should be schema-backed. All public pages should include a Claim Boundary section. Prefer clear operator-facing language over jargon.

The core loop is Objective → Mission Contract → Proof Jobs → Tool Traces → Evidence Docket → Validator Reports → Governed Decision State → Settlement Receipt → Chronicle → Capability Package.
